hypothesis: A physics-informed nonlinear mixing module that explicitly models inter-molecular vibrational coupling and cross-terms in IR spectra of mixtures will enable the model to disentangle overlapped bands and increase Top-10 accuracy on imbalanced real-world ATR-IR mixtures by at least 5 percentage points over the current linear-combination-trained baseline, with the largest gains for systems exhibiting strong hydrogen-bonding and spectral overlap.
